component.name: OpenScreen
OpenScreen 录屏
component.summary: Record your screen and create professional demos
录制屏幕并制作专业演示视频

description.p: OpenScreen is a free and open-source screen recorder and video editor, designed as a simplified alternative to Screen Studio. It lets you record your screen with automatic zoom effects, webcam overlays, and annotations, then export polished product demos and walkthroughs.

ul.li: Screen recording with microphone and system audio
Webcam overlay with customisable mask shapes
Timeline editor with speed control and trim
Export to MP4, WebM, or GIF
Multiple aspect ratios and background options

description.p: OpenScreen 是一款免费开源的录屏与视频编辑工具，支持自动缩放、摄像头叠加、 文字标注等功能，可导出 MP4、WebM 或 GIF 格式。
Latest stable release with auto-follow zoom and webcam mask shapes.
